title: ageratinastrum polyphyllum var. marungense
intro: Ageratinastrum polyphyllum var. marungense is a plant species, also known as a shrub, that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ageratinastrum polyphyllum var. marungense include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce oxidative stress and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and prevent illness.
